title: Image To Image Object Vocabulary Sticker Labels AI
sourceTitle: Image To Image Object Vocabulary Sticker Labels AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image English vocabulary sticker-label edit for an uploaded fixed source visual style, lighting, and render finish with concrete medium cues from the prompt photo. Subject: The uploaded fixed source visual style, lighting, and render finish with concrete medium cues from the prompt photo remains unchanged; only English labels for passport, camera, ticket, notebook, sunglasses are added beside the real visible objects, with small arrows pointing to the correct items. Scene: Original photo background, lighting, composition, object positions, colors, and camera angle are preserved exactly, with playful educational label stickers added on top. Composition: Preserve every original object and spatial relationship; Signature Elements: Uploaded fixed source visual style, lighting, and render finish with concrete medium cues from the prompt, passport, camera, ticket, notebook, sunglasses, cute pastel sticker labels, small arrows, tiny star and heart doodles, preserved original photo, and beginner-friendly vocabulary-learning effect. Fixed source details: Source Photo Subject: travel desk flat lay. Style: Cute English-learning sticker overlay with soft colors, rounded borders, tiny stars, hearts, and light doodles, suitable for children or beginner English learners while keeping the underlying photo natural. Color Palette: Original photo colors stay unchanged; sticker labels use soft pastel accents, white or cream label fills, gentle outline colors, and readable dark English words. Lighting: Original photo lighting is preserved; Typography: English labels use simple lowercase object words such as cup, book, pen, phone, apple, glasses, plant, or bag; keep words short, readable, and matched only to real visible objects. Restrictions: label only objects that are truly visible; keep arrows accurate; and preserve the uploaded photo as the base image.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
